name: Normalyze
description: Normalyze — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool for developers. Specializes in Cloud Data Security.

seo.title: Normalyze Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Normalyze analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec.

review.verdict: Normalyze is a Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool.
pros: Integrates into CI/CD for developer-friendly security checks
cons: False positives require ongoing developer triage time
review.best_for: Dev teams needing SAST, DAST, or SCA in the pipeline
review.not_for: Projects with no regulatory or security compliance needs
